regulations.title: PF Wage Ceiling
regulations.description: Maximum basic salary for mandatory PF contribution calculation

regulations.title: Employer PF Contribution Rate
regulations.description: Employer contributes 12% of basic salary to PF

regulations.title: ECR Filing Due Date
regulations.description: Electronic Challan cum Return must be filed by 15th of following month

regulations.title: ESI Wage Threshold
regulations.description: Employees earning up to ₹21,000/month are covered under ESI

regulations.title: PF Registration Employee Threshold
regulations.description: Businesses with 20+ employees must register for PF
